title: Heapsort — Sorted Output
description: Sort an array using heapsort. Build a max-heap then extract elements one by one. Output the sorted array in non-decreasing order.
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: n integers.
outputSpec: The sorted array in non-decreasing order.

botCodes.code:
import heapq
n=int(input())
a=list(map(int,input().split()))
heapq.heapify(a)
print(*[heapq.heappop(a) for _ in range(n)])
